summary: Iteration 37: Onboarding Videos & Dashboard Redesign - All backend APIs tested (13/13 passed). Frontend verified: dark blue background (#0D1B2A), Centro de Aprendizado section, Videos Explicativos page with 3 placeholder videos, FAQ accordion. Onboarding modal code exists but couldn't be tested as has_seen_onboarding=true for test establishment.
critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding modal code is properly implemented in dashboard.tsx with welcome screen, video steps (1-3), and congratulations screen
Videos section in help.tsx correctly shows placeholders when video_url is empty
All establishment pages use #0D1B2A background color as specified

test_credentials.admin: email=admin@itoke.master, name=Admin iToke (requires long press on logo + key 'admin123')

seed_data_creation: 3 default onboarding videos created by seed data: 'O que e um Token?', 'Como Comprar Tokens?', 'Como Alocar Tokens em Ofertas?' - all with empty video_url (placeholders)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding modal appears only when has_seen_onboarding=false. Test establishment already has has_seen_onboarding=true. To test onboarding modal, need to reset flag in database or create new establishment. Admin video management is in FAQ tab with sub-tabs for 'FAQ Cliente' and 'FAQ Estabelecimento' - VideoForm and VideoItem components are reusable.

backend: GET /api/onboarding-videos?target=client - returns client videos (empty by default)
GET /api/onboarding-videos/all?target=establishment - returns all videos including inactive
PUT /api/admin/onboarding-videos/{id} - updates video title, description, active status
Seed videos exist with correct data (empty URLs = placeholders)
frontend: Centro de Aprendizado section at top of dashboard with yellow lightbulb icon
'Como Usar - Assista aos Videos' green button navigates to /establishment/help
Help page shows 'Videos Explicativos' section header
3 video cards with placeholders ('Video em breve') since seed videos have empty URLs
Video titles: 'O que e um Token?', 'Como Comprar Tokens?', 'Como Alocar Tokens em Ofertas?'
Onboarding modal code exists with welcome, video steps, and congratulations screens (not visible because has_seen_onboarding=true)
